figures.caption: TABLE I POSITIONING OF MECHANICAL CONSCIENCE (MC) RELATIVE TO RELATED THREADS. ✓: ADDRESSED; –: NOT ADDRESSED OR OUT OF SCOPE; △: PARTIALLY ADDRESSED.

Fig. 2. Trade-off between task reward and normative deviation as a function of conscience strength β. The balanced operating regime (β ≈ 0.8–2.0) achieves substantial deviation reduction with moderate performance cost, revealing the interpretable conscience operating point.
Fig. 1. Trajectory-level regulation. A baseline controller drifts outside the normative admissible region C; the MC layer continuously redirects the trajectory toward acceptable evolution.
